title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Go First Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Logistics Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!
